north_star: I co-create a flourishing world by caring deeply. Present in my body, I allow my care to manifest through my actions, directing me to work for the flourishing of all beings, including humans, animals, and myself. For animals: avoid exploitation (vegan). For humans/me: Be well, be in agentic loving care, get rid of old restrictive patterns, freedom of self-expression, capability and dynamic range. Also: boost myself and my relationships/communities, both for joy of doing it, but also for increased capacity to work for the good of all.

items: Claude Code usage as automatic/frictionless as possible
current_goals.connection: Multiplying personal capability and automation increases capacity to direct care into the world — becoming a more effective agent for flourishing.

items: Mix productive output with being very human: present, mindful, high wellbeing
Mindful forest walks, breaks from screen
Vajrayana practice and evolving ground — working towards enlightenment
current_goals.connection: Embodiment is both the foundation to act from and the transformation itself — 'present in my body' is the north star lived daily. Vajrayana and inner work directly serve freedom from old restrictive patterns.

items: Good relationships with friends and partner
Find the others — people for co-creation of the mission
current_goals.connection: Both intrinsically valuable (flourishing includes connection and joy) and instrumentally necessary (the mission of co-creating a flourishing world needs a team).

items: Drive impact through positive-sum tech: coordination, anti-addiction, veganism, d/acc, gov tech
Substack writing and lively intellectual discussions
Learn LLM automation, harness engineering, exocortex
Frameworks for effective action and paradigm shifts
Balance automation with security and integrity
current_goals.connection: The direct expression of care becoming concrete impact in the world. Intellectual rigor (frameworks, writing, paradigm shifts) ensures care is directed effectively — care without clarity can misfire.
